# Sreenath M Menon

> Staff Software Engineer with 14+ years of experience in product engineering and applied AI, based in Bengaluru, India. Creator of llmswap, an open-source LLM toolkit with 41,000+ downloads. Works at the intersection of cloud infrastructure, developer tooling, and AI agents.

Sreenath M Menon is a staff software engineer at IBM (India Systems Development Lab). He builds open-source AI tools and has placed Top 15 of 70,000+ at the Meta x Hugging Face x PyTorch OpenEnv hackathon and Top 50 at the Anthropic x Accel hackathon.

## Profile

- [Website](https://sreenathmenon.com): Personal site with projects, experience, and writing.
- [About](https://sreenathmenon.com/about/): Background, experience timeline, and skills.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/sreenathmmenon): Open-source projects and code.
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/sreenathmmenon): Professional profile.

## Experience

- Staff Software Engineer, IBM (India Systems Development Lab), 2019–present. Product engineering and applied AI; title progression from Staff to Advisory Software Engineer.
- Systems Analyst, UST Global, 2018–2019. Customer-interaction platform on AWS Connect, Transcribe, and Comprehend.
- Senior Software Engineer L2, Poornam Info Vision, 2011–2018. Cloud-management product development and an OpenStack-based billing platform.

## Projects

- [llmswap](https://llmswap.org): Provider-agnostic LLM SDK and CLI supporting 11 providers with zero vendor lock-in. 41,000+ downloads. [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/llmswap), [GitHub](https://github.com/sreenathmmenon/llmswap).
- [Krelvan](https://krelvan.com): Self-hostable platform that turns a plain-English outcome into a running multi-agent system on a signed, append-only event-sourced runtime. [GitHub](https://github.com/sreenathmmenon/krelvan).
- [Asha Sahayak](https://github.com/sreenathmmenon/asha-sahayak): Reinforcement-learning environment for AI-assisted clinical triage for India's ASHA health workers. Top 15 of 70,000+ at the Meta x Hugging Face x PyTorch hackathon.
- [Sampark OS](https://github.com/sreenathmmenon/sampark-os): Autonomous AI broker for India's informal maritime economy using a multi-agent swarm and Claude Vision.
- [Eklavya Council](https://npmjs.com/package/eklavya-council): Structured AI debate engine where expert personas debate a question and a synthesis engine produces decisions and action items.
- [Aegis WAF](https://aegis-waf.vercel.app): AI-powered web application firewall defending LLM apps against prompt injection and adversarial inputs.

## Recognition

- Top 15 of 70,000+ — Meta x Hugging Face x PyTorch OpenEnv hackathon (2026).
- Top 50 Finalist — Anthropic x Accel hackathon; invited to Anthropic India Dev Day (2025).
- 96/100 — OpenAI x OutSkill hackathon.
- Featured on Hacker News (2x Show HN).
- Advanced Certification in AI & ML, IIIT Hyderabad.

## Skills

- Languages: Python, TypeScript, Go.
- AI/ML: LLMs, RAG, AI agents, MCP protocol, reinforcement learning, LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, vector databases.
- Platform & data: Kubernetes, Docker, AWS, Azure, GCP, OpenStack, Kafka, MongoDB, PostgreSQL.

## What this person does not do

- This is an individual engineer's personal site, not a company or an agency.
- Does not sell products or services and does not list pricing.
